narrative:
Chagrin Falls Ex Vill Sd (Cuy) exempted village school district has 8,746 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.6 percentage points.
